meta.name: description
meta.content: GUST is a powerful, modern web proxy designed by the Nautilus Labs dev team for especially restrictive environments. Its fully static, single HTML file nature allows it to be downloaded, shared, and distributed with ease, and with no reliance on serviceworkers, GUST can run in a file without the need to host it on an admin-blockable website. - GUST/svg/site.svg at main · nautilus-os/GUST

font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:var(--ac); background:rgba(157,229,255,0.10); border:1px solid rgba(157,229,255,0.35); border-radius:6px; padding:2px 7px; font-family:var(--mono);\"\u003ev1.0\u003c/span\u003e"," \u003c/div\u003e",""," \u003cdiv"," style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; font-size:13px; line-height:1.7; color:var(--tx2);\"\u003e"," \u003cdiv\u003e"," \u003cdiv"," style=\"color:var(--tx); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;\"\u003e"," \u003ci class=\"fas fa-globe\" style=\"color:var(--ac);\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e How it"," works"," \u003c/div\u003e"," Gust is a \u003cstrong style=\"color:var(--tx);\"\u003estatic\u003c/strong\u003e web proxy"," browser that runs entirely inside a single HTML file."," When you navigate to a URL, Gust fetches the target site's HTML,"," CSS, scripts, and assets through \u003cem\u003eWisp\u003c/em\u003e, then rewrites"," all resource URLs and injects them into a sandboxed iframe. Gust can be run inside any HTML editor, \u003ccode"," style=\"background:var(--bg3); padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; font-size:12px;\"\u003eiframe\u003c/code\u003e, file, or blob. It's ultra lightweight, packed with features, and is near impossible to block for admins."," "," \u003c/div\u003e",""," \u003cdiv\u003e"," \u003cdiv"," style=\"color:var(--tx); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;\"\u003e"," \u003ci class=\"fas fa-network-wired\" style=\"color:var(--ac);\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e"," WISP + libcurl.js"," \u003c/div\u003e"," All network requests are tunnelled through a \u003cstrong"," style=\"color:var(--tx);\"\u003eWISP WebSocket server\u003c/strong\u003e. Your"," browser opens a WebSocket to the WISP endpoint, which forwards"," TCP/TLS connections on your behalf. The actual HTTP fetching is"," handled by \u003cstrong style=\"color:var(--tx);\"\u003elibcurl.js\u003c/strong\u003e"," \u0026amp;mdash; a port of the curl HTTP library compiled to WebAssembly"," \u0026amp;mdash; giving full HTTPS, redirect, and cookie support inside the"," browser context."," \u003c/div\u003e",""," \u003cdiv\u003e"," \u003cdiv"," style=\"color:var(--tx); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;\"\u003e"," \u003ci class=\"fas fa-code\" style=\"color:var(--ac);\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Page"," rendering"," \u003c/div\u003e"," Fetched HTML is parsed and rewritten in JavaScript. CSS stylesheets"," and scripts are loaded through the proxy and injected inline or as"," Blob URLs. Images, fonts, and other assets have their URLs rewritten"," to route through the same proxy pipeline. The final document is"," rendered inside a sandboxed \u003ccode"," style=\"background:var(--bg3); padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; font-size:12px;\"\u003eiframe\u003c/code\u003e"," using a generated Blob URL."," \u003c/div\u003e",""," \u003cdiv\u003e"," \u003cdiv"," style=\"color:var(--tx); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;\"\u003e"," \u003ci class=\"fas fa-shield-halved\" style=\"color:var(--ac);\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e"," Privacy \u0026amp; limitations"," \u003c/div\u003e"," Because requests flow through the WISP server, your real IP is not"," exposed to the sites you visit. However, the WISP server operator"," may be able to see your traffic."," Some complex web features (native WebSockets from within pages,"," WebRTC, service workers) cannot be fully proxied and may not work."," JavaScript inside the iframe is fully sandboxed from the parent"," page."," \u003c/div\u003e",""," \u003cdiv\u003e"," \u003cdiv"," style=\"color:var(--tx); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;
